questions.question: Between 1962-1986, this variety and talk show was critically acclaimed, owing especially to its good-natured host and his interviewing skills.
When going to restaurants, what choice were you given by the host or hostess?
What famous singer and pianist, blind by age seven, recorded in multiple genres but was best known for his songs "Hit the Road, Jack" and "Georgia on my Mind"?
What horse was jockey Eddie Arcaro riding when they won the Triple Crown in 1948?
What famous tagline, uttered by Ronald Reagan, came from the movie Knute Rockne: All American?
